text.title: Backend Languages Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for practices-backend-languages.

conclusion.verdict: service/form/query objects; controllers handle HTTP only
Form Request validation + injected Service class
thiserror Result + tokio async; no blocking I/O inside async

text.example: language=go → cmd/internal/pkg layout; OrderService.Charge wraps payment errors via fmt.Errorf("charge %s: %w", id, err); consumer-side interface OrderRepo in handler package. Rule: go-layout-and-errors.
